---
title: Co-activity gradients
jupyter: python3
---

### Set up and load data

```{python}

## Import modules
import abct
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
from scipy import io
from nilearn import plotting

## Load data
data = io.loadmat("./data/hcp_data.mat")

```

### Get co-activity gradients

```{python}

# Unpack data
W = data["W"]
C = data["X"].T @ data["X"]

# Define co-activity gradient parameters (see kneighbors)
k = 5
kwargs = {"type":"common", "kappa":0.1, "similarity":"network"}
np.random.seed(1)   # Set random seed

# Weighted gradients
V_wei = abct.kneicomps(C, k, "weighted", **kwargs)
V_wei = V_wei[:, [0, 1, 3]]

# Binary gradients
V_bin = abct.kneicomps(C, k, "binary", **kwargs)
V_bin = V_bin[:, [1, 2, 3]]

# Flip sign of weighted gradients to match binary gradients
V_wei *= np.sign(np.sum(V_wei * V_bin, 0))

# Residual degree
D_wei = abct.degrees(C, "residual")

```

### Show maps of weighted and binary co-activity components

```{python}

parc = data["parc"].ravel() - 1
n_hemi = len(parc) // 2

gii_left = "./data/S1200.L.very_inflated_MSMAll.32k_fs_LR.surf.gii"
comps = {"Weighted co-activity gradient": (V_wei, "viridis"),
        "Binary co-activity gradient": (V_bin, "viridis")}

for i, (name, Vals_cmap) in enumerate(comps.items()):
    Vals, cmap = Vals_cmap
    for j in range(Vals.shape[1]):
        plotting.plot_surf(
            surf_mesh=gii_left,
            surf_map=Vals[:, j][parc][:n_hemi],
            view = "lateral",
            title = f"{name} {j+1}",
            cmap = cmap,
            vmin = -0.1 if i == 0 else 0,
            vmax = 0.1 if i == 0 else 1,
        )

```

### Show map and scatter of residual degree

```{python}

plotting.plot_surf(
    surf_mesh=gii_left,
    surf_map=D_wei[parc][:n_hemi],
    view = "lateral",
    title = "Residual degree",
    cmap = "viridis",
    vmin=np.percentile(D_wei[parc][:n_hemi], 5),
    vmax=np.percentile(D_wei[parc][:n_hemi], 95),
)

# Scatter plot of residual degree and weighted co-activity gradient
fig = px.scatter(   
    x=D_wei,
    y=V_wei[:, 0],
    labels={"x": "Residual degree", "y": "Weighted co-activity gradient 1"},
    title=f"r = {np.corrcoef(D_wei, V_wei[:, 0])[0, 1]:.3f}",
    width=600, height=600,
)
fig.update_layout(title_x=0.5).show()

```
